cards.name: Gismart - Dmitri Lipnitsky
cards.desc:
**Studio:** Gismart
**Location:** London, UK
**Downloads:** 1B+
**Status:** Independent

**Decision Maker:** Dmitri Lipnitsky, CEO & Co-founder
**Email:** dmitri.lipnitsky@gismart.com
**LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/dmitri-lipnitsky

**Notable Games:**
- Fat 2 Fit (100M+)
- Cool Goal (50M+)

**Outreach Angle:** AI content generation for rapid prototyping - Gismart's high release velocity could benefit from AI-powered level design and content variation

**Priority:** HIGH

**Email File:** 01_gismart_dmitri_lipnitsky.txt

cards.name: TapNation - Hervé Montoute
cards.desc:
**Studio:** TapNation
**Location:** Paris, France
**Downloads:** 1B+

**Decision Maker:** Hervé Montoute, Co-founder & CEO

**LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/herve-montoute

**Notable Games:**
- Blob Runner 3D (100M+)
- Ice Cream Inc. (50M+)

**Outreach Angle:** AI-powered player segmentation - TapNation already uses AI for prototyping. Expand to AI-driven player segmentation for better monetization

**Priority:** HIGH

**Email File:** 02_tapnation_herve_montoute.txt

cards.desc:

**Email File:** 06_playrix_dmitri_bukhman.txt
